entities.name: BARNYARD MILLET
entities.description: Important crop from nutritional point of view with scarce genetic information

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Crop used as a source of genomic SSRs for cross transferability studies

entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: Crop used as a source of genomic SSRs for cross transferability studies

entities.name: GENOMIC SSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used for assessing cross transferability, polymorphism, and genetic diversity

entities.name: CROSS TRANSFERABILITY
entities.description: The ability of genomic markers from one species to be used in another species

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC MARKERS
entities.description: Markers that exhibit variation among different genotypes

entities.name: SYNTENIC REGIONS
entities.description: Conserved genomic regions between different species

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to analyze the genetic grouping and distribution of genotypes

entities.name: PIC VALUES
entities.description: Polymorphism Information Content, a measure of the informativeness of a genetic marker

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological trait related to the length of the panicle

entities.name: YIELD-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that influence the overall productivity and yield of the crop

entities.name: SPIKELET FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of spikelets to produce viable seeds

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant from the ground to the tip

entities.name: ROOT TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the structure and function of the root system

entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE
entities.description: The biological process of leaf aging and degradation

entities.name: BLAST
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the crop

entities.name: BROWN PLANT HOPPER RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infestation by brown plant hoppers

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to group genotypes into clusters based on genetic similarity
